name: Ring of Magnetism
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>磁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>指</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can only equip this card to a monster on your side of the field. Decrease the ATK and DEF of a monster equipped with this card by 500 points. In addition, all the monsters on your opponent's side of the field can only attack the monster equipped with this card, if they attack.
eff: You can only equip this card to a monster on your side of the field. Decrease the ATK and DEF of a monster equipped with this card by 500 points. In addition, all the monsters on your opponent's side of the field can only attack the monster equipped with this card, if they attack.

attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
misc: Equips only to a specific target
